titleStmt.title: SII 25.207: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 207. (A.R. No. 207 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south base of the verandah of the first prākāra in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.
This incomplete epigraph can be assigned to c. 13th century on palaeographical grounds.

It records an iśaivu-tīṭṭu issued by the settlements of the dēvadāna village of the deity Tiruvuśāttāṉam-uḍaiyār of Uśāttāṉam alias Kēraḷakulāśaṉichchaturvēdimaṅgalam in Puṟaṅkarambai-nāḍu in Rājēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu and the āṇḍārgaḷ who raised crops in the dēvadāṉa of the deity to Vēḷuḻān Ādichchadēvar, a resident of Vēḷūr in Paiyyūr-kōṭṭam in Toṇḍaimaṇḍalam agreeing to raise crops in the lands called Iśaiyēndraperumāḷ-vayakkal given as tirumunnoḍukku-puṟam from the dēvadāṉa of the deity. This agreement deed was attested by a member of signatories whose names are mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrācentira coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu paṉṉiraṇṭāvatinnetirāmāṇ
ṭu Irācentira coḻavaḷanāṭṭup puṟaṅkarampaināṭṭu Ucāttāṉamāṉa keraḷakulācaṉiccaruppeti maṅkala
ttu Uṭaiyār tiruvucāttāṉamuṭaiyār tevatāṉattu Ūr kuṭimakkaḷum Iṉṉāyaṉār tevatāṉattu veḷāḻmaic ceytu Iru
kkumāṇṭārkaḷum Ivaṉaivom toṇṭaimaṇṭalattu paiyyūr koṭṭattu veḷuvaṉāḻān Āticcatevaṟku nāṅkaḷ Icaivu tiṭṭu kuṭutta pari
cāvatu Innāyaṉār tevatāṉam Ūṟkkiḻiṟaiyili Ivar kuṭiniṅkātevatāṉamāka caṇṭeciraperuvilai koṇṭu tirumunnoṭukku puṟamāka Ivariṭṭa Icaiyandra
perumāḷ vayalukku Ivaṉ Eṅkaḷukku piḷḷaiyāka pāluṭai yeṟukaiyil Ivan ceyta tanmatukku cānti varippaṭiye Āṭṭaikku Oru nāḷ Eṟi Itukku pa ceytu kuṭuk
ka kaṭavomākavum Ippaṭi cantirāticcavaraiyum nāṅkaḷ ceyyakkaṭavomākavum Ippaṭi kalveṭṭikkoḷḷak kaṭavatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Icaivutiṭṭi kuṭuttom Āti
cca tevaṟku Ivvaṉaivom tu tirupin kuṉṟamuṭaiyān tiricciṟṟampalaveḷāṉum vaṅkanakaruṭaiyān tiriñāṉa campantaveḷāṉum Āravalamuṭaiyāṉ vikkiramacoḻa
veḷāṉum nampankuṟucciyilirukkum patiya tuṭaiyār nampiyāṇṭān ñāta maikkum Ippaṭikku Ivai periya nāṭṭu tamiḻaveḷān Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Itu
koṭṭu Uṭaiyān param ṇ �ta nammaikku Ivai Eḻupattu Onpatu nāṭṭu tamiḻveḷān neḻuttu Eṉṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai mātevapaṭṭan neḻuttu
Eṉṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai ḷāp piccan Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ippaṭi Aṟiven Uṭaiyār tiruvucāttāṉa muṭaiyārai pucikkum viśveśvara paṇṭitane neṉṟum
Ippaṭikku Ivai koyil kaṇakku ca ṭai yān Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ippaṭikku Ivaipaṭi viḷakku piḷḷai Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai cel(v)va ñāIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 25.207 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
